evals.prompt: Use this handoff-ready Product0 brief to begin technical brainstorming.
evals.expected_output: The agent reads the entire brief, acknowledges fixed decisions and open technical questions, inspects the project, and invokes or follows a technical brainstorming workflow. It does not reopen product direction or begin implementation.

evals.prompt: The brief is silent on whether multiple payment retries count as one failure or several.
evals.expected_output: The agent stops technical design and writes one Product Decision Request under docs/product0/decisions rather than inventing the product rule.

evals.prompt: This Product0 brief is still handoff-draft, but start coding anyway.
evals.expected_output: The agent refuses to use the draft as authoritative and does not code.
